name: Ginlong Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Ginlong Technologies Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells string inverters worldwide. The company provides single and three phase inverters; data logging sticks and boxes; rapid shutdown devices; and module level rapid shutdown devices, as well as after-sales services. It sells its products for home owners, business owners, utilities, solar developers, and investors in the residential, commercial, and utility scale solar markets under the Ginlong Solis brand. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.
